title: Styloglossum lyroglossum
intro: Styloglossum lyroglossum, also known as the 'Horned Tongue Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Styloglossum lyroglossum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Styloglossum lyroglossum is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and capsules.

The Orchidaceae family has been further divided into several subfamilies, and Styloglossum lyroglossum falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae.
